task_completion.description: Verify that the Subsurface application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Subsurface application window is maximized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window takes up the entire screen space, and the window controls show the 'restore down' icon instead of the 'maximize' icon.

task_completion.description: Verify that the main dive list is visible in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or list of dives with column headers is visible in the main area of the Subsurface application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'SAC' column is displayed in the main dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column header 'SAC' is present in the main dive list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'CNS' column is displayed in the main dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column header 'CNS' is present in the main dive list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Rating' column is hidden from the main dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column header 'Rating' (or a star icon representing the rating column) is absent from the main dive list.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI to configure the columns.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Subsurface GUI (e.g., right-clicking column headers to open the context menu) rather than using terminal commands to modify configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the genuine Subsurface software, not a text editor, image viewer, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing commands modifying Subsurface config files (e.g., editing ~/.config/Subsurface/Subsurface.conf).
